title: Sept 19 Day Trading Recap: Our Best Idea Hit All Targets
author: Finnext-AI
selftext:
With the **Finnext: AI Stock Forecasts** app, trading ideas come easier.  
On Sept 19 our top pick was **BLSH**:

* Entry: **$64.60**
* Stop loss: **$63.30**
* Take profits: **$66.00, $67.00, $69.80**

All targets were hit perfectly, closing near the highs at $69.88. 🚀  
Smart tools, clear levels - trading made simpler.

Every day you get **3 new trading ideas** in the app
